steps.text: Distribute the subtraction sign to every term in the second polynomial: \((6t^{4}-6t^{2}+4t-2)-(5t^{4}-3t^{3}+7t^{2}-2) = 6t^{4}-6t^{2}+4t-2-5t^{4}+3t^{3}-7t^{2}+2\).

Evaluate every choice:
  • A: \(t^{4}+3t^{3}-13t^{2}+4t\) — Matches exactly. That matches choice A — A is correct.
  • B: \(t^{4}-3t^{2}+3t\) — Missing the \(3t^3\) term and has wrong \(t^2\) and \(t\) coefficients. Eliminated.
  • C: \(t^{4}-3t^{3}+11t-4\) — Wrong sign on \(t^3\), no \(t^2\) term, wrong constant. Eliminated.
  • D: \(t^{4}+3t^{3}-13t^{2}+4t-4\) — Includes a \(-4\) constant, but the constants cancel to 0. Eliminated.
